# Olas Contribute

> Community contribution app for the Olas ecosystem

## Overview

Contribute is the Olas app where community members coordinate content marketing for Olas DAO. Users connect their X (Twitter) account, post about Olas using campaign keywords or mentioning @autonolas, earn points, climb a leaderboard, and can stake OLAS to earn rewards.

## Key Features

- Leaderboard: View ranked contributors with points, tiers, and social links. See active Twitter campaigns with keywords to promote.
- Staking: Stake OLAS tokens and earn rewards for posting about Olas on X.
- Profiles: View individual contributor profiles with badge NFTs, points breakdown, and tweet history.
- Badge NFT: Mint a free dynamically-generated badge NFT based on contribution tier.

## Documentation

- Website: https://contribute.olas.network/
- Documentation: https://contribute.olas.network/docs
- Disclaimer: https://olas.network/disclaimer

## Technology

Built with Next.js, React, and Web3 technologies. Integrates with X (Twitter) for social features and supports staking mechanisms across multiple blockchain networks.

## Olas Ecosystem

- Olas (hub): https://olas.network/llms.txt
- Govern (vote on proposals, manage veOLAS, direct staking emissions, make donations, manage epochs): https://govern.olas.network/llms.txt
- Operate (review live staking contracts, run agents): https://operate.olas.network/llms.txt
